description: Create the complete index.html file for ProActive Plus (PAP) product page with all tabs, calculator, and styling based on index (17).html reference layout
steps: Step 1: Create index.html with the same CSS/layout structure as 'index (17).html' but rebrand for ProActive Plus. Key changes: (a) Title/header becomes 'ProActive Plus (PAP) - Asuransi Jiwa Berjangka | Manulife Indonesia', (b) WA banner text stays 'Petrus Jakub Partner Bisnis Manulife' + WA logo + '087781896087', (c) WA link target becomes 'https://wa.me/6287781896087?text=Pak%20Petrus%2C%20saya%20mau%20tanya%20soal%20Asuransi%20ProActive%20Plus', (d) Color scheme stays green (#00a758, #006838)

Step 2: Create Tab 1 'Ringkasan Produk' with content from product materials: What is PAP (term life insurance from Manulife), key features (6 keunggulan: Proteksi Optimal, Premi Terjangkau, Masa Pertanggungan Fleksibel, Jaminan Premi Tetap, Dapat Diperpanjang, Pilihan Mata Uang), product specifications (age range, term options, min premiums, currency options), and available riders (ADDB, Medicare Plus, Waiver of Premium). Use simple language for laypersons.

Step 3: Create Tab 2 'Manfaat' with benefit details: Death benefit (100% UP), renewal without re-underwriting, fixed premiums, riders explanation (ADDB for accident death/disability, Medicare Plus for health coverage with plan details F through Executive, Waiver of Premium for premium waiver on disability). Include a comparison table of minimum premiums by payment mode.

Step 4: Create Tab 3 'Kalkulator Premi' - THE MOST CRITICAL SECTION. Embed the premium rate data from premium_data.json as JavaScript objects. Calculator controls: (a) Jenis Kelamin (Pria/Wanita), (b) Status Merokok (Merokok/Tidak Merokok), (c) Usia (18-69, but max age depends on selected PPP term: max = 70 - PPP), (d) Masa Pembayaran Premi / PPP (5-20 tahun), (e) Uang Pertanggungan / Sum Assured (input field, min Rp 100jt). Calculator logic: determine rate category index (0=male smoker, 1=male nonsmoker, 2=female smoker, 3=female nonsmoker), lookup rate from appropriate table (ge1m if UP >= 1 Miliar, lt1m if UP < 1 Miliar), calculate annual premium = rate * (UP / 1,000,000), then show monthly/quarterly/semester/annual breakdowns. Display result in plan cards similar to reference file style.

Step 5: Create Tab 4 'Ketentuan Polis' with simplified policy terms from KetSus PAP: cooling off period (14 days), renewal conditions (up to age 70, no re-underwriting), policy change options, termination conditions, reinstatement (within 2 years), grace period (45 days), claim procedure (90 days deadline), and exclusions in simple language.

Step 6: Create Tab 5 'Cara Klaim' with claim procedures: documents needed (death certificate, claim form, original policy, ID), submission deadline (90 days), payment timeline (30 days after approval), and Manulife contact info (Customer Contact Center).
Step 7: Create Tab 6 'Ilustrasi' showing a sample illustration based on the C. Ilustrasi file: 45yo male, non-smoker, UP 1 Miliar, PPP 5 years, showing yearly premium payments and coverage timeline.

Step 8: Create Tab 7 'FAQ' with accordion-style Q&A covering: What is PAP, who can buy it, how premiums are calculated, what happens if you miss a payment, how to renew, what are the exclusions, what riders are available, how to file a claim.

Step 9: Add the floating WA button at bottom-right (same as reference), with tooltip 'Petrus Jakub - 087781896087'. Ensure all WA links point to the correct number with correct pre-filled message about ProActive Plus.

Step 10: Ensure all JavaScript works correctly: tab navigation, FAQ accordion, calculator computation with proper validation (age vs PPP constraint, minimum UP, proper rate lookup), number formatting (Indonesian format with dots as thousands separator), and responsive design for mobile.
acceptance_criteria: index.html exists in /projects/sandbox/Project-pap/ and is a valid HTML5 document
All CSS and JS is inline (no external dependencies)
Sticky WA banner at top shows 'Petrus Jakub Partner Bisnis Manulife' + WA icon + '087781896087' and links to wa.me with correct pre-filled message about ProActive Plus
Tab navigation works - clicking each tab shows the correct content panel
Calculator correctly computes premiums: for age 30, male, non-smoker, PPP 20, UP 1 Miliar (1000 juta), annual premium should be 3.00 * 1000 = Rp 3,000,000 (using ge1m rate of 3.0 for MNS PPP20 age30)
Calculator validates age constraint: max entry age = 70 - PPP term (e.g., PPP 20 max age is 50, PPP 5 max age is 65)
All content is in Indonesian, written in simple language for laypeople
Floating WA button appears at bottom-right corner
verification: Run: python3 -c "import os; assert os.path.exists('/projects/sandbox/Project-pap/index.html'), 'index.html not found'"

Run: python3 -c "content=open('/projects/sandbox/Project-pap/index.html').read(); assert 'ProActive Plus' in content; assert '087781896087' in content; assert 'Petrus Jakub' in content; assert 'wa.me' in content; print('Basic content checks passed')"

Run: python3 -c "content=open('/projects/sandbox/Project-pap/index.html').read(); assert 'Pak%20Petrus%2C%20saya%20mau%20tanya%20soal%20Asuransi%20ProActive%20Plus' in content; print('WA message check passed')"

Run: python3 -c "content=open('/projects/sandbox/Project-pap/index.html').read(); assert '3.0' in content or '3.00' in content; assert 'ge1m' in content or 'rates' in content.lower(); print('Calculator data check passed')"
Run: python3 -c "content=open('/projects/sandbox/Project-pap/index.html').read(); assert content.count('tab-content') >= 7; print('All tabs present')"
findings: Premium rate formula: rate * (UP / 1,000,000) * 1000 gives correct results (e.g., rate 3.0, UP 1B = Rp 3,000,000). The rate unit is effectively per-mille (rate/1000 applied to UP). No build/test commands needed as this is a static HTML file. All verification tests pass. The file is 87KB including embedded premium data (~47KB of JSON rate tables).
